message:
chore(beads): close stalled fd90 child beads completed in parallel

- frankenpandas-4vno (fp-io SQL query builder helpers, cod-pandas-4):
  scope shipped via fd90.14/15/16/19/34 (sql_select_all_query_in_schema,
  sql_select_columns_query_in_schema, sql_create_table_query_in_schema,
  sql_insert_rows_query_in_schema, sql_multi_row_insert_query_in_schema,
  sql_drop_table_query_in_schema). All route through identifier
  validation + conn.quote_identifier + conn.parameter_marker.

- frankenpandas-gdg2 (fpd-sql schema introspection types, cod-pandas-3):
  scope shipped via fd90.21 (SqlConnection::table_schema trait method,
  rusqlite PRAGMA table_info override, SqlColumnSchema +
  SqlTableSchema value types). Subsequent fd90.35 + fd90.37 added
  comment / autoincrement column-level fields.

Both cod agents stalled since 2026-04-25T09:40 (cod usage limits
until 2026-04-30). Closing as completed-elsewhere instead of
reopening because the work IS done and re-opening would invite
duplicate effort when cod agents resume.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
